## Summary

- What changed?
- Which issue does this advance?

## Validation

- [ ] I linked the primary issue
- [ ] I ran the relevant verification commands
- [ ] I included evidence for risky or non-obvious behavior

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope stayed bounded to the intended issue
- [ ] Docs were updated if behavior or contracts changed
- [ ] Follow-up work is recorded in GitHub if anything remains open
